meta.note: Tharma's Portugal v Spain match parlay (BK8). Three legs on one slip — Portugal to qualify, over 1.5 total goals, and both teams to score. All three auto-settle against verified ESPN results once the match is final; the qualify leg settles on advancement (90 min, extra time, or penalties).
meta.disclaimer: Fun-money tracking only. Returns shown are stake × odds (includes the stake back). Legs settle against ESPN's official match result and statistics.
